# Essays

*[Francis Bacon](../philosophers/bacon.md) · 1597*

A collection of short essays of practical wisdom and moral philosophy, in which Bacon observes human affairs with a lucid eye, ambition, fortune, truth, and atheism. The work, repeatedly enlarged until 1625, reveals the moralist and shrewd judge of human beings behind the reformer of the sciences.
